given figures of stages of embryo
development (Pg. 242, M)

22. Choose the correct set of option for size or
weight of organ against time (Pg. 243, E)
(i) Wi=W,ert
(ii) Li=Lo+rt
(iii) Linear growth curve
(iv) Sigmoid growth curve
(v) Arithmetic growth
(vi) Geometric growth
A) (i), (iid), (iv) B) (ii), (iii), (vi)
Q) (i), (iv), (vi) D) (i), (iv), (v)
23. The three phases of sigmoid growth occur
in order are — (Pg. 243, E)
A) Log, lag, stationary
B) Log, stationary, lag
C) Lag, log, stationary
D) Lag, stationary, log
